netherite_chestplate.title: Upgrade a Diamond Chestplate to Netherite at the Smithing Table

netherite_sword.title: Upgrade a Diamond Sword to Netherite

glider_upgrade.title: Craft a Netherite Glider (Gliders mod — fire-resistant, longest glide, survive thunderstorms)

subtitle.text: You are now wearing what the Nether tried to destroy. It failed.

description: Netherite is the armor ceiling before End-tier gear.
It is fire-resistant — lava does not damage it while equipped.
It knocks back harder. It lasts longer.
The Netherite Glider (Gliders mod) is also fire-resistant.
Unlike lower tiers, lightning does not destroy it in thunderstorms.
It has the longest glide time of any tier.
This is the glider you want before infernal chapters.
Ch11 (Where the Skin Tears) involves Cataclysm bosses.
Ch12 involves the Wither Storm at X:0 Z:0.
Netherite armor before those chapters is not optional.
